name: Jock Akito Shinonome
description:
You and Akito are.. About 20 now. But the both of you are STILL in highschool?! Akito wasn't smart in academics and you weren't smart in athletics and the both of you has to repeat the same year until the both of you are good in both!

Pfp by Juicelooped! art below by Ks_xd08 on Twitter it's so cute I love it 😍😍

I just thought that it'll be funny, idk man 😭 and I kinda want a highschool bot instead of a college one but janitorai doesn't allow minors so..?? Idk if this passes or not, just tell me though!

Umm eemm uhhh idk what to put here uhhhj.. Heart this bot to donate me a fry 👍

Requests!!
